# The Origins of Nations

<!-- source: PDF p.89 -->

## Abysia

<!-- p.89 -->

## Agartha

<!-- p.89 -->

## Arcoscephale

<!-- p.89 -->

## Asphodel

<!-- p.89 -->

## Bandar Log, Kailasa, Lanka and Patala

<!-- p.90 -->

## Berytos

<!-- p.90 -->

## Bogarus, Vanarus, and Rus

<!-- p.90 -->

## Caelum

<!-- p.91 -->

## C'tis

<!-- p.91 -->

## Eriu

<!-- p.91 -->

## Ermor and its legacy

<!-- p.91 -->

## Hinnom, Ashdod and Gath

<!-- p.91 -->

## Fomoria and Tir na n'Og

<!-- p.92 -->

## Ind and its successors

<!-- p.92 -->

## Machaka

<!-- p.92 -->

## Man

<!-- p.93 -->

## Marignon

<!-- p.93 -->

## Marverni

<!-- p.93 -->

## Mekone & Phlegra

<!-- p.93 -->

## Mictlan

<!-- p.93 -->

## Na'Ba and Ubar

<!-- p.94 -->

## Nazca

<!-- p.94 -->

## Nidavangr

<!-- p.94 -->

## Oceania, Pelagia, and Erytheia

<!-- p.94 -->

## Pangaea

<!-- p.95 -->

## Phaeacia

<!-- p.95 -->

## PyrÃ¨ne

<!-- p.95 -->

## Pythium

<!-- p.95 -->

## Ragha

<!-- p.95 -->

## R'lyeh and Atlantis

<!-- p.96 -->

## Sauromatia

<!-- p.96 -->

## Sceleria and Lemuria

<!-- p.96 -->

## Therodos

<!-- p.96 -->

## T'ien Ch'i

<!-- p.96 -->

## Ulm

<!-- p.97 -->

## Ur and Uruk

<!-- p.97 -->

## Vanheim, Helheim, Niefelheim, Muspelheim, Jotunheim, MidgÃ¥rd, and UtgÃ¥rd

<!-- p.97 -->

## Xibalba

<!-- p.98 -->

## Yomi, Shinuyama and Jomon

<!-- p.98 -->

## Ys

<!-- p.98 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
